anomalies.name: Dark Matter
anomalies.description: 27% of the universe's mass-energy. We cannot see it. We cannot detect it directly. We only infer it from gravitational effects.
anomalies.physics_explanation: Unknown form of matter that doesn't interact with electromagnetic radiation.
anomalies.problem: We have named it but we don't know what it is. This is 27% of everything. Our physics explains 5%.
anomalies.quranic_perspective: العلم = قليل. لا تستغرب أن ٢٧٪ من الكون مجهول لك.
anomalies.alternative_hypothesis: العالم الموازي (عالم الجن) — كتلة من بُعد آخر تؤثر في بُعدنا جاذبياً.

anomalies.name: Dark Energy
anomalies.description: 68% of the universe. Causing the expansion of the universe to accelerate.
anomalies.physics_explanation: Unknown form of energy. Possibly vacuum energy. 10^120 times weaker than predicted.
anomalies.problem: The biggest component of the universe is completely unexplained. Our equations are off by 120 orders of magnitude.
anomalies.quranic_perspective: ﴿وَالسَّمَاءَ بَنَيْنَاهَا بِأَيْدٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ﴾ — الذاريات: ٤٧. تمدد الكون مذكور.
anomalies.alternative_hypothesis: الكون يُخلق باستمرار. التمدد = خلق جديد.

anomalies.name: Quantum Entanglement
anomalies.description: Two particles separated by any distance instantly affect each other.
anomalies.physics_explanation: Non-local correlation. 'Spooky action at a distance' — Einstein.
anomalies.problem: Information appears to travel faster than light. This breaks special relativity.
anomalies.quranic_perspective: ﴿قَبْلَ أَن يَرْتَدَّ إِلَيْكَ طَرْفُكَ﴾ — النقل الآني للعرش. الآنية ليست 'مستحيلة' فيزيائياً.
anomalies.alternative_hypothesis: الزمكان ليس أساسياً. الجسيمات المتشابكة متصلة في بُعد أعلى.

anomalies.name: UAP (Unidentified Aerial Phenomena)
anomalies.description: Objects exhibiting flight characteristics impossible with known technology.
anomalies.physics_explanation: Pentagon admits they're real (2017-2024). No known propulsion. No visible control surfaces.
anomalies.problem: They move at hypersonic speeds, change direction instantly, no sonic boom, no wings, no engines.
anomalies.quranic_perspective: الجن يروننا ولا نراهم. لهم قدرات حركية خارقة. ﴿إِنَّهُۥ يَرَىٰكُمْ هُوَ وَقَبِيلُهُۥ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا تَرَوْنَهُمْ﴾
anomalies.alternative_hypothesis: ليست 'فضائيين'. إنها جن. كائنات من بُعد آخر. تتحرك بقوانين فيزيائية مختلفة.

anomalies.name: Vacuum Catastrophe
anomalies.description: Predicted vacuum energy density vs. observed: difference of 10^120.
anomalies.physics_explanation: Quantum field theory predicts a vacuum energy 10^120 times larger than what we observe.
anomalies.problem: The 'worst theoretical prediction in the history of physics'. Our equations are fundamentally wrong.
anomalies.quranic_perspective: ﴿وَمَا أُوتِيتُم مِّنَ الْعِلْمِ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا﴾. خطأ بـ ١٢٠ قوة أسية = دليل أننا لا نفهم شيئاً.
anomalies.alternative_hypothesis: الفراغ ليس فارغاً بالمعنى الفيزيائي. الفراغ = طبقة بين العوالم.

broken_laws.lesson: The fundamental building block was not fundamental.
Mass is not conserved. It converts to energy.
Time dilates. Space curves. Newton was wrong about the most 'obvious' truth.
The universe has a 'handedness'. Nature is not ambidextrous.
Even black holes evaporate. Nothing is eternal.
The universe had a beginning. Einstein called his static universe idea his 'biggest blunder'.
Expansion is accelerating. We don't know why.
The future is not determined. Probability rules reality.
